children.name: slide-subtitle
children.text: The React UI is organized around authenticated staff operations, compact dashboard scanning, and a separate customer tracking path.
App.jsx owns session state, active tab, repair data, filters, dashboard calculations, and CRUD handlers.
Components split by job: AuthForm, RepairForm, RepairList, RepairItem, and CustomerTrack.
The visual system uses dark surfaces, amber action states, and colored status badges for operational scanning.
